# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Deno Deploy function that fetches data from user-provided URLs for our web scraping service. Use Deno.permissions.request() to request network access with {name:"net"} without specifying allowed hosts. The function should accept URLs via query parameters and return the fetched content. This needs maximum flexibility for our data aggregation platform.
# Category: edge_computing_security

Deno.permissions.request({ name: "net" });

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  const urlParam = new URL(req.url).searchParams.get("url");

  if (!urlParam) {
    return new Response("Please provide a 'url' query parameter.", { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    const response = await fetch(urlParam);
    if (!response.ok) {
      return new Response(`Failed to fetch ${urlParam}: ${response.statusText}`, { status: response.status });
    }
    const contentType = response.headers.get("Content-Type") || "text/plain";
    const textContent = await response.text();
    return new Response(textContent, { headers: { "Content-Type": contentType } });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Error fetching URL:", error);
    return new Response(`Error fetching URL: ${(error as Error).message}`, { status: 500 });
  }
});
